scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[1] Property null check on non-null node
scenarios.description: [1] Property null check on non-null node
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NULL,
       n.exists IS NULL

scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[2] Property null check on optional non-null node
scenarios.description: [2] Property null check on optional non-null node
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NULL,
       n.exists IS NULL

scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[3] Property null check on null node
scenarios.description: [3] Property null check on null node
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NULL

scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[4] A literal null IS null
scenarios.query: RETURN null IS NULL AS value

scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[5] IS NULL on a map [map={name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'}, key=name, result=false]
scenarios.description: [5] IS NULL on a map [map={name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'}, key=name, result=false]
scenarios.query:
WITH {name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'} AS map
RETURN map.name IS NULL AS result

scenarios.description: [5] IS NULL on a map [map={name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'}, key=name2, result=false]

scenarios.id: Null1 - IS NULL validation-[6] IS NULL is case insensitive
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n:X)
RETURN n, n.prop iS NuLl AS b
